title: Muoh Optimize X Vulkan
description: Achieving an effortless 2500+ FPS with this modpack is just the beginning — Muoh Optimize stands as an unparalleled pinnacle among all Minecraft optimization modpacks, redefining performance standards like never before
body:
Muoh x Vulkan Modpack – The Most Powerful Minecraft Modpack



The Muoh x Vulkan Modpack is specially designed Minecraft setup that runs off of Vulkan instead of OpenGL. Vulkan provides you with a much better graphics API that allows for high performance, higher frames, and an overall better experience then your average modpack which only bloats Minecraft even more.



🔗 Built Upon [Spunky Optimize](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spunky-optimized) and [EzzFPS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfps) Packs.



Features of Muoh x Vulkan Modpack



☑ Vulkan Rendering Engine – Increases your FPS while decreasing CPU usage by replacing Minecrafts old OpenGL engine with Vulkan’s new low-overhead graphics engine.

☑ Reduction of Tiny Stutters & Input Lag – Experience buttery smooth input by removing microstuttering and input delay.

☑ Optimized for Low-End – Our modpack has been optimized to run better than ever on low-end and/or older PCs.

☑ Less Crashes and Memory Leaks – Say goodbye to Minecraft’s memory leaks and frequent crashes thanks to Vulkan’s advanced memory management.

☑ Keep Your Modded Servers Running Smoothly – Experience less frame drops and stuttering on your heavily modded Minecraft server.



DesktopComputer Why Vulkan Instead of OpenGL?



Minecraft was built with OpenGL as its foundation. This was great back when Minecraft first came out, but as technology has progressed, Minecraft can no longer reach its full potential with OpenGL alone. Vulkan is a low-overhead graphics API that allows your computer to achieve better graphics than ever before. Vulkan does this by allowing your computer to “talk” to your graphics card more directly. Below are some benefits you’ll experience when using Vulkan:.




⚡ Much Higher Frames – Experience a smoother Minecraft with higher FPS, making gaming more enjoyable on low end to older PCs.

🧠 Much Less CPU Usage – Vulkan will run most of the game’s rendering in GPU allowing your CPU to do other tasks at the same time.

📉 Less Frame Peaking & Micro Stuttering – Terrain will load in much faster allowing for smooth movements as you travel through the world.

🛡 Less Crashes and better longevity – Say goodbye to memory leaks and frequent crashes.






Mcpack to Zip Converter- https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/
